word: H7936 - שָׂכַר - sâkar - saw-kar' - Earn wages

sections.paragraph:
Original: סכר שׂכר

Transliteration: śâkar sâkar

Phonetic: saw-kar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to hire
    1. (Qal) to hire
    2. (Niphal) to hire oneself out
    3. (Hithpael) to earn wages

Origin: a primitive root [apparently akin (by prosthesis) to H3739 through the idea of temporary purchase]

TWOT entry: 2264.1

Part(s) of speech: Verb
